title: Hey Duggee interactive plush — sound and motion
itemDetails:
Hey Duggee interactive plush (BBC Studios / Studio Aardman; licensed by Golden Bear Toys). Large brown dog in yellow Squirrel Club uniform, blue tie knot, embroidered activity badges on chest (music, bird, diamond, purple circle variants visible). Official lines include Talking Musical Duggee (~25 cm, badge press for theme tune) and larger Interactive Duggee (voice-activated responses, lights in chest, songs/sounds from show). Project title implies sound/motion electronics inside. Batteries typically AAA in badge/body compartment. Materials: soft plush, embroidered appliqué badges. Market: current children’s licensed plush; repair usually wiring, switch, or battery corrosion. Sources: Golden Bear / heyduggee.com product pages.

Photo/product ID T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
repairDetails:
Hey Duggee plush — internal animatronic/wiring; verify stray duck after image.

Identified T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
